name: Leuven

overview.description: Leuven is home to KU Leuven, one of Europe's oldest universities, and has a sizeable international and Indian student community. Content below is a starter sample.
whyVisit: Student-friendly city with strong international community

attractions.name: Leuven Town Hall
attractions.description: Ornate Gothic town hall on the Grote Markt.

transportation.description: Direct trains to Brussels in ~25 minutes.

tips: Leuven has one of the highest concentrations of international students in Belgium.
Content on this page is a starter sample pending admin review.
